lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition. It runs and drives but has some mechanical issues that should be addressed before long-term reliable use. The interior shows moderate wear, including some staining and minor damage to surfaces. The exterior has visible scratches and possibly minor dents consistent with its age and use.
This car is in poor condition with significant wear, mechanical issues, and will require repairs before reliable use.

A solid, dependable ride at a great value price! This vehicle is in fair condition — it starts reliably and handles your everyday driving needs with ease, from commutes to errands and weekend trips. You'll notice some wear and minor imperfections that come with a well-used car, but nothing that gets in the way of getting you where you need to go. If you're looking for honest, practical transportation without breaking the bank, this one deserves a serious look!

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has multiple visible dents, scratches, and paint damage across several panels. The interior shows heavy wear including damaged upholstery, cracked trim, and staining. The vehicle has mechanical issues and will likely require significant repairs before reliable daily use. Sold as-is.

This vehicle is being offered in mint condition — truly one of the finest examples you'll find on the used car market today. The exterior is immaculate: the paint retains a deep, showroom-quality shine with absolutely no visible scratches, dents, or blemishes of any kind. The interior is equally pristine — every surface, seat, and panel looks and feels as though it just rolled off the dealer's lot. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and cleanly, with all mechanical systems performing exactly as intended. The tires have excellent tread remaining, all electronics and features function perfectly, and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained throughout its life. This is a rare opportunity to purchase a used vehicle that genuinely requires nothing — you can drive it home with complete confidence.

This vehicle is offered in fair condition and is priced to reflect its current state honestly. The exterior shows noticeable wear — the paint has faded and lost much of its original luster in several areas, with visible scratches, scuffs, and some minor surface rust spots present. The body panels are generally intact but show the marks of everyday use over the years. The interior is functional but worn, with the upholstery showing fading, some tears or fraying, and general signs of age; the dashboard and trim pieces are intact but scuffed. Mechanically, the vehicle runs and drives, though it is not without its quirks — expect that some maintenance or minor repairs may be needed in the near term. The tires have usable tread remaining but are not new. This is a solid option for a buyer looking for a practical, budget-conscious vehicle who is comfortable with cosmetic imperfections and understands that some investment in upkeep may be required. What you see is what you get — no surprises hidden here.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that exemplifies what 'mint condition' really means. This stunning automobile has been meticulously maintained from day one — spotless interior with zero wear on surfaces, an exterior that gleams with factory-fresh brilliance, and a mechanically sound drivetrain that performs exactly as the manufacturer intended. Every system has been inspected and verified: clean title, no accidents, and service records that tell a story of consistent, loving care. This is the rare find that discerning buyers wait months for. Don't miss your opportunity to own a vehicle that drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Hey there, car lovers! 🚗✨ I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you today. This beauty is in truly mint condition — we're talking spotless inside and out, runs like a dream, and turns heads wherever she goes. I've taken incredible pride in keeping this car in top-notch shape, and it genuinely shows in every detail. The interior is fresh and clean, the exterior gleams, and everything works exactly as it should. Honestly, finding a car in this kind of condition at this price is rare, and I want it to go to someone who'll love it as much as I have. Don't sleep on this one — deals like this don't last long! Feel free to reach out with any questions. I'm an open book and happy to chat anytime. 😊

2019 Ford Mustang GT Premium – Meticulously maintained performance machine presenting in exceptional condition throughout. Powered by the legendary 5.0L Coyote V8, producing a factory-rated 460 horsepower and 420 lb-ft of torque, mated to the smooth-shifting 10-speed SelectShift automatic. Compression checks consistent across all cylinders, no oil consumption between intervals, and the cooling system running well within optimal thermal range. Brembo brake package retains strong pedal feel with excellent rotor thickness remaining. Interior surfaces show zero wear on bolsters, headliner, or dash — truly a driver who understood how to care for a performance vehicle. OEM Recaro seating, SYNC 3 infotainment, and active exhaust system all functioning flawlessly. Paint depth and clarity are showroom-quality with no swirl marks, chips, or corrections visible under inspection lighting. This is the rare example that genuinely earns the 'mint' descriptor — turn-key, track-ready, and priced for a serious buyer.
Mint condition. Turns heads, drives perfect. Zero issues. First to see will buy. $43,500 — won't last.

Meet your next great adventure — a stunning machine that turns every commute into a occasion worth remembering. This beauty carries itself with quiet confidence: paint that catches the light like it just rolled off the showroom floor, an interior that wraps you in comfort without a whisper of wear, and an engine that hums with the kind of smooth, eager authority that makes you look for reasons to keep driving. Every detail has been lovingly maintained, and it shows in the way this car simply *feels* right the moment you settle into the seat. Whether you're chasing horizons on the open highway or threading through city streets with effortless style, this is the car that rises to every occasion. Opportunities like this don't linger — come experience it for yourself before someone else claims this gem.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of turnkey perfection. Meticulously maintained from day one, it presents with flawless paintwork, a spotless interior free of any wear, and a mechanically sound drivetrain that purrs with confidence. Every surface, every stitch, and every system reflects the care of a fastidious previous owner. Whether you're a discerning collector or simply refuse to settle for anything less than the best, this is the one you've been waiting for. Come see it in person — it speaks for itself.
